assets.purpose: Legacy monthly snapshot baseline for the accepted annuity replay slice.
assets.refresh_trigger: Update when accepted annuity replay semantics or baseline period changes.
assets.notes: Primary parity compare input for the deep-sample slice.

assets.purpose: Deterministic workbook fixture for fast annuity replay and gate tests.
assets.refresh_trigger: Update when intake normalization or checkpoint expectations for annuity replay change.
assets.notes: Accepted as a synthetic fixture only, not a real-data intake baseline.

assets.purpose: Curated high-value annuity scenarios beyond the single replay baseline.
assets.refresh_trigger: Create when Phase 2 or later governance promotes annuity golden-set coverage into a dedicated asset pack.
assets.notes: Tracked explicitly so it is not forgotten.

assets.purpose: Result baseline separate from the accepted replay snapshot.
assets.refresh_trigger: Create when annuity replay grows beyond the single accepted monthly snapshot baseline.
assets.notes: Not materialized yet as a separate artifact.

assets.purpose: Standalone malformed annuity inputs for contract-failure coverage.
assets.refresh_trigger: Create when error-path fixtures move from inline tests into repository-native assets.
assets.notes: Current failure cases are generated inline in tests.

assets.purpose: Real-data-style annuity workbook sample for source-intake governance.
assets.refresh_trigger: Register when a committed or governed external sample becomes available.
assets.notes: Phase 2 confirms this is the target baseline, but the sample is not yet repo-native.
